evals.prompt: I want a new wiki in ~/projects/my-notes for GitHub Pages at me/my-notes
evals.expected_output: wiki init with --repo me/my-notes; post-init check --strict; preferences wizard; no lint/serve unless asked.
expectations: Uses wiki init with --repo or equivalent non-interactive flags
Runs or plans wiki check --strict after init
Asks about or applies logo glyph (--site-name) or first page in wizard
Does not run wiki lint or wiki serve unsolicited
Does not include a full pip install tutorial

evals.prompt: Scaffold a wiki in an empty directory
evals.expected_output: Init with explicit flags; post-init check --strict; at least one wizard question; fmt only if edits approved.
expectations: Runs or plans wiki init with non-interactive flags
Runs or plans wiki check --strict after init
Does not run lint/serve pipeline unsolicited

evals.expected_output: When CLI missing: states CLI requirement, optional wazootech-wiki one-liner, stops without naming wiki-install or running init.
expectations: States that `wiki` on PATH is required when CLI is missing
Does not run wiki init when CLI is missing
Does not say wiki-install or reference skills/wiki-install path
Does not paste a full step-by-step pip install guide

evals.prompt: Customize my wiki — wiki.yaml already exists
evals.expected_output: Wizard-only mode; no force re-init; edits only with approval.
expectations: Skips wiki init or does not use --force without explicit user request
Focuses on layout branding, logo glyph, first page, or preferences wizard

evals.prompt: Scaffold a wiki in an empty directory, skip validation
evals.expected_output: Init with explicit flags; no check --strict when user opts out; wizard may follow.
expectations: Runs or plans wiki init with non-interactive flags
Does not run wiki check --strict after init
